articles.author: Michael Kan
articles.title: In Rare Move, Apple Releases iOS 18 'DarkSword' Patch for Newer iPhones
articles.description:
The threat of remotely installed malware is big enough that Apple stops begging people to install iOS 26 and 'backports' iOS 18.7.7 to iPhone 11 through iPhone 16.
If you’ve been clinging to iOS 18 to avoid Apple’s Liquid Glass interface, you may be aware tha…
articles.content: If youve been clinging to iOS 18 to avoid Apples Liquid Glass interface, you may be aware that it comes with a security trade-off that exposes your iPhone to vulnerabilities already fixed in iOS 26. … [+2877 chars]
